description: A systems engineer needs to conduct a failure modes and effects analysis (FMEA) for a new interplanetary probe's communication system.

nodes.task_description: Identify all components of the communication system (transmitters, receivers, antennas).
For each component, brainstorm potential failure modes (e.g., transmitter failure, antenna deployment failure).

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a comprehensive list of potential failures.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the effect of each failure on the overall mission and assign a risk score. Propose mitigations for high-risk items (e.g., add a redundant transmitter).

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the FMEA table and recommends adding a backup transmitter.
